description: Tight-budget heterogeneous gap test using catalog_multieco. Budget 2900 makes 2x-premium-lamp infeasible (cost 2+2+hub=3080) but 1-mid+1-premium lamp fits (2760). Expected: enum_repair finds Q=0.893 (2x AQL-Mid + 2x AQMS-Prem + AQ-Hub), brute force finds Q=0.905 (1x AQL-Mid + 1x AQL-Prem + 2x AQMS-Prem + AQ-Hub). BF strictly dominates heuristic on quality (same E=2, H=1). Also has yandex-direct solution (E=1 H=0 Q~0.77) on Pareto front. Fast BF (~1-2s), pure gap demonstration.
